name: SubAgentTools
description: Tools available only to sub-agent sessions for reporting terminal task outcomes.

capabilities.name: report_subtask_done
capabilities.description: Only for Sub-Agent sessions. Report that delegated work has reached a terminal state and provide a structured summary for the parent session barrier merge.

summary.description: Concise final result summary for parent planner.

needs_followup.description: Whether parent planner should do additional follow-up.
